Identity.Name: StingWorkflowStates
Identity.Definition: Workflow instance states for the Template Engine v1.1 WorkflowEngine. Generic across all workflow definitions (transmittal_default, deliverable_issue_default, rfi_default, mr_default, tq_default, plus per-project presets). Drives "My Queue" lookups, SLA escalation, audit history.

Value.Definition: Draft — workflow instance created, not yet issued.
In Review — issued, awaiting reviewer action.
Approved — reviewer / approver has signed off. Next transition typically: Issued.
Issued — transmittal / deliverable / RFI dispatched to recipients.
Acknowledged — recipient has confirmed receipt. Terminal for transmittals; intermediate for RFIs.
Superseded — replaced by a later revision. Retained for audit; read-only.
Cancelled — instance withdrawn before issue. Retained for audit.
Rejected — reviewer / approver has rejected. Returns to Draft with rejection reason.
On Hold — paused pending external input. SLA timer suspended.
